text:
FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance/Administrative-
Simplification/NationalProvIdentStand/ 

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The NPI is a unique number assigned to identify providers. NPIs are the standard provider identifiers 
beginning in 2007. Values and websites referenced may change over time. 

To search CMS’s NPI registry, you may use the following link: https://npiregistry.cms.hhs.gov
